productDisplayName: Puma Men Black Logo Woven Tracksuit
description: Style Note Now train in style with puma's new collection of tracksuit for men. Pair it with Sports t-shirts and performance shoes for an extended training session.  Product Details Black track jacket that has mock collar, full front zipped closure, elasticated hem and cuffs, long sleeves, white panels on the front and back, two insert pockets on the waist, embroidered brand name on the left chest and brand tab appliqued on the right hem Black track pant with a mesh like fabric inside, has an elasticated waistband with a drawstring on the inside, two insert side pockets, embroidered branding on the left leg and toggle strap at the hem Material and Care 100% polyester Gentle machine wash in lukewarm water Do not soak, bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Cool iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height:6' and waist:32") is wearing a size M
